description: Negative test: an AI integration document with a fallback chain that cycles must be rejected at lint time. A conformant fallback chain must terminate in 'escalateToHuman' or 'fail'. The inline AI document declares three fallback steps that form a cycle (stepA → stepB → stepC → stepA), with no terminal action.

ai.title: Cyclic Fallback Chain Test
ai.description: Intentionally invalid: fallback chain cycles without a terminal action. Must be rejected by wos-lint.

fallbackChain.description: INVALID: cycles back to stepA instead of terminating

expected_errors: AI-041: fallback chain for agent 'documentClassifier' contains a cycle: stepA → stepB → stepC → stepA
